title: NhatJS's Furniture RP Textures
description: Change the look of the basic blocks (vanilla) to a more modern version.
body:
**THIS MOD IS BETA, SO THERE ARE A LOT OF ERRORS OR UNFINISHED OBJECTS.**

Welcome to NhatJS's Furniture RP Textures. This resource pack is designed as a visual enhancement companion to the [NhatJS's Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/nhatjs-furniture-mod), transforming the look of vanilla Minecraft blocks into sleek, modern designs that better match the furniture and electronics added by the mod.


Screenshots: in "Gallery" tab
